predicates.metric: fraction of retrieved nodes that match query intent
fraction of relevant nodes returned vs declared ground-truth set
no chain of retrieved nodes contradicts knowledge-core verified-truth
every mandatory warning attached to selected nodes is present in package
every required step in declared workflow is present in package
every declared onboarding flow has retrievable bound nodes
for each symptom, ≥1 retrievable diagnostic node exists
for each symptom, declared causal edges are traversable
for every declared escalation predicate, retrievable handoff procedure exists
every retrieval-package carries a provenance manifest

rules: Predicates are declared; ad-hoc validation is unsafe.
Failure of any high-severity predicate blocks promotion of the slice past proof.
Validation results are append-only and signed with provenance.
Validation cannot mutate knowledge-core under any circumstance.
Predicates are evaluated per product when scope is per-product.
